# User Story

As an exporter

I need to be able to select "Create a UK non-manipulation document" on the "What do you want to do?" page in the Fish Export Service (FES)

So that I can choose the correct journey 

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1 - What do you want to do page updated - NMD wording

- Given I have navigated to the 'What do you want to do?' page in the FES service when the page loads

- Then the third radio button option is 'Create a UK non-manipulation document', this is allready present, just check the wording

- Add a div with class `.hint-exporterCompanyName` which will contain the hint text below the radio button this this content: 'Previously called the 'storage document''

### Scenario 2 - Create catch certificate formatting changed

- Given I have navigated to the 'What do you want to do?' page in the FES service

- When the page loads then the radio option for catch certificate is renamed to 'Create a UK catch certificate' And the text within brackets that says 'Including links to direct landing documents' is moved to hint text underneath the label

### Scenario 3 - Welsh translations

- Given I have navigated to the 'What do you want to do?' page in the FES service

- When I have selected Welsh language thhen the radio button options are translated to Welsh

| English text | Welsh translation |
|--------------|-------------------|
| Create a UK non-manipulation document | Creu dogfen dim triniaeth ar gyfer y DU |
| Previously called the 'storage document' | Roedd yn cael ei galw'n 'ddogfen storio' o'r blaen |
| Create a UK catch certificate | Creu tystysgrif dalfa yn y DU |
| Including links to direct landing documents | Gan gynnwys dolenni at ddogfennau glanio uniongyrchol |

### Scenario 4 - Changes reflected when navigating from Admin app

- Given I have accessed the non-manipulation document journey via the Admin app, `mmo-fes-internal-admin-fe`

- When I navigate to the 'What do you want to do?' page then the changes in scenario 1 - 3 are present

### Scenario 5 - Tests
- Update tests to reflect the changes made in scenarios 1 - 3
